summary: Adjusted the opening to emphasize territorial takeover rather than another movement-into-discovery scaffold, and tightened the closing handoff so it seeds Marcus's Day 7 condition without repeating Chapter 6's cursor/message beat.
edits: Reframed the opening around Lena's possession of the cafeteria, then let Noor enter the scene from the doorway.
Added a brief late-chapter sightline on Marcus in the second-floor pod and replaced the blinking-reply-box emphasis with a quieter terminal carryover.
